blog.heading: Solar Insights
blog.subtitle: Latest updates on solar technology, energy savings tips, and Nesol Energies projects across Pakistan.

posts.title: 5kW Solar System: Complete Cost Guide for Pakistan 2024
posts.excerpt: Learn how much a 5kW solar system costs in Pakistan, what it includes, and how much you can save on electricity bills.
posts.content:
A 5kW solar system is the most popular choice for Pakistani homes. It typically includes 9-11 panels, a 5kW inverter, mounting structure, and installation.

Average savings range from Rs 15,000 to Rs 25,000 per month depending on your electricity tariff and usage patterns.

Nesol Energies offers free site surveys and customized quotes. Contact us for an exact price based on your roof and energy needs.
posts.author: Nesol Energies

posts.title: Net Metering in Pakistan: Step-by-Step Process
posts.excerpt: Everything you need to know about applying for net metering with DISCOs in Sindh, Punjab, and across Pakistan.
posts.content:
Net metering allows you to sell excess solar energy back to the grid. The process involves:

1. System installation by a certified installer
2. NOC from DISCO
3. Application submission with required documents
4. Inspection and meter installation

Nesol Energies handles the complete net metering process for our clients.
posts.author: Nesol Energies

posts.title: Hybrid vs On-Grid Solar: Which is Right for You?
posts.excerpt: Compare hybrid and on-grid solar systems to find the best solution for load shedding and bill savings.
posts.content:
On-grid systems are ideal if you have reliable grid power and want maximum bill savings through net metering.

Hybrid systems add battery backup for load shedding — perfect for areas with frequent power outages.

Our experts at Nesol Energies can recommend the best option after a free consultation.
posts.author: Nesol Energies
